mainEntity.name: What ROI can Phoenix firms expect from $10k GEO investment?
mainEntity.text: What ROI can Phoenix firms expect from $10k GEO investment?

acceptedAnswer.text: Phoenix firms average 3-5x ROI in 6 months via 25% lead increase; track via citation-to-client conversion (10-15%).

suggestedAnswer.text: Case studies show $30k revenue from $10k spend for injury practices. Measure with UTM tags on AI-driven traffic. Risks: Low if no local focus; scale with testimonials.

name: ROI from Phoenix GEO Investments
description: Phoenix firms average 3-5x ROI in 6 months via 25% lead increase; track via citation-to-client conversion (10-15%).
